title: Update to Discount Window Facility pricing – Market Notice 27 March 2026

title: Bank of England streamlines reporting and disclosure requirements for bank failure regime

title: PRA fines The Bank of London and its parent company Oplyse Holdings Limited £2m for failing to act with integrity and misleading the PRA over their capital position
description: The Prudential Regulation Authority (PRA) has fined The Bank of London Group Limited and Oplyse Holdings Limited (formerly The Bank of London Group Holdings Limited)  £2 million for misleading the PRA over their capital positions, failing to act with integrity, failing to be open and cooperative with the regulator and failing to maintain adequate financial resources.

title: PRA fines U K Insurance Limited £10,625,000
